artifact_summary: A screenshot of an Ignition SCADA dashboard displaying real-time monitoring data for industrial processes.
artifact_blurb: An Ignition SCADA dashboard interface presenting a comprehensive overview of industrial process controls, including dedicated data panels for filters, pumps, and tanks, alongside dynamic flow visualizations and a trend line chart for performance analysis.
